subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-07-05
subcodes.first_line: You are very welcome! In the divine Holy Books there are unmistakable prophecies
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسیار بسیار خوش آمدید در جمیع کتب مقدسه الهیه بشاراتی است که بشارت میدهد روزی
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @predictions and prophecies, @blind imitation [taqlid], @growth of the Cause, @oneness; unity of religion, @prophecy and fulfillment
